authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(89) — Mary Lake (Lake Mary, Mono Co.)
2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (Updated 06/01/2026)
sources.quotedText: (89) Mary Lake (Lake Mary, Mono Co.). Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15. 5 trout

sources.title: Mammoth Lakes Basin | Fishing, Hiking and Camping | Visit Mono County
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R6 Mono Mary Lake Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take April-November

sources.title: Wikipedia — Lake Mary, Mono County, California (infobox coordinates and GNIS ID; used because the USGS GNIS ArcGIS gazetteer (nationalmap.gov geonames MapServer/7) has no queryable record for gaz_id 263249 or for the name "Lake Mary"/"Mary Lake" in Mono County, CA, despite all neighboring Mammoth Lakes Basin lakes — Lake Mamie, Lake George, Horseshoe Lake, Twin Lakes — being present in that layer)
sources.quotedText: Lake Mary is a freshwater lake and the largest of the Mammoth Lakes in Mono County, California.

parameters.note: §7.50(b)(89) lists this water as 'Mary Lake', identified in the regulation text as located at Lake Mary, Mono Co. — this is the well-known Lake Mary in the Mammoth Lakes Basin.

regulations.humanSummary: Open last Saturday in April through November 15
regulations.verbatimText: Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15.

parameters.counting_rule: Daily limit of 5 trout per §7.50(b)(89); possession limit of 10 (twice the daily limit) per the statewide default trout possession rule in §5.85.

regulations.humanSummary: Daily bag limit of 5 trout, possession limit of 10

parameters.note: Closed to fishing outside the last-Saturday-in-April through November 15 season.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed outside the last Saturday in April through November 15 season
regulations.verbatimText: Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document lists Mary Lake (Mono Co.) as a Put and Take water stocked with catchable-size rainbow trout during the release month range April through November.
